title: Some bird species are suffering particularly from the heatwave: "It is an additional factor contributing to their disappearance from cities"

news.title: Some bird species are suffering particularly from the heatwave: “It is an additional factor contributing to their disappearance from cities”

world.title: Some bird species are suffering particularly from the heatwave: "It is an additional factor contributing to their disappearance from cities"

environment.compositionIntent: A high-key paper surround preserves negative space while accepted Zaha Hadid-style fracture systems carry heatwave pressure: the background supplies atmosphere and drafting depth, the middleground fracture module owns the off-center pressure spine and compressed grid, and the foreground mark field adds near scratches, hatching, loops, and dot catches without taking over the main band.

distanceSafety.reason: Canonical public camera retained because the accepted isolated previews already read as broad horizontal abstract fields; no desktop or mobile evidence has shown a need to reframe.

contrast.notes: High-key light preserves the pale paper value field while a low graphite rim keeps black drafting lines, red fractures, and yellow heat vectors separated.

paramSemantics.band: visual placement/readability band for full-world params; distinct from declared compositionOwnership.lane

owns: background atmosphere, palette/value field, shallow depth, and active negative space
surrounding WebGPU-safe environment behavior that gives other parts room to read
avoid: main news-pressure band unless explicitly assigned
main knot or focal tangle unless explicitly assigned

compositionAdaptations: Kept as the enclosing background and active negative-space shell.
High-key environment settings preserve the accepted pale paper field and leave the main heat-pressure band to the middleground part.
Kept as the enclosing background and active pale-paper negative-space shell; tuned world environment and high-key lighting so it supports rather than owns the main pressure band.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Attempt 2 Playwright desktop preview rendered a nonblank Zaha Hadid-derived environment: pale paper surround, diagonal red/yellow heat-pressure veils, translucent grey architectural planes, and fine drafting-line fields with active negative space.

Attempt 2 render report shows healthStatus ok, captureStatus ok, WebGPU renderer/backend active, and WebGPU-safe evidence for MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, PointsMaterial, utilities.createDirectionSpaceSkyboxShell, and utilities.createPointParticleField.
The environment owns a single enclosing direction-space shell and background atmosphere only; it avoids the main news-pressure band, barricade/grid, and focal knot reserved for later parts.

owns: background atmosphere, palette/value field, shallow depth, and active negative space

paramSemantics.band: visual placement/readability band for full-world params; distinct from declared compositionOwnership.lane

owns: middleground selected-news pressure structure: dominant band, grid compression, barricade, or equivalent pressure form
avoid: full foreground artist mark field of loops, scratches, drips, splatters, and near-line behavior

compositionAdaptations: Retained as the middleground selected-news pressure structure, preserving the off-center red/yellow/black fracture spine and compressed grid seen in accepted preview evidence.
Recorded as middleground-pressure so the visual band stays distinct from ownership lane and does not imply a foreground override.
Preserved as the middleground primary news signal with off-center red/yellow/black fracture spine, compressed grid, and barricade pressure.
composition modified non-literal-fracture-pressure from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Inspected the local concept-reference image directly; used it only as advisory broad palette/value/density guidance.
Static validation succeeded for drafts/non-literal-fracture-pressure.module.mjs with no errors.
Playwright preview attempt 2 captured desktop screenshot previews/attempt-002/002-non-literal-fracture-pressure-draft-desktop.jpg with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Render report previews/attempt-002/desktop-render-report.json confirms WebGPU renderer/backend, MeshBasicMaterial and LineBasicMaterial safe surfaces, and material-factory evidence for color-field and procedural-marks.

Screenshot shows a pale negative-space middleground field crossed by off-center red/yellow/black fracture spine, compressed grid strands, and dispersing fragments, readable as Hadid-style heatwave pressure without literal subject matter.

owns: middleground selected-news pressure structure: dominant band, grid compression, barricade, or equivalent pressure form
avoid: full foreground artist mark field of loops, scratches, drips, splatters, and near-line behavior

paramSemantics.band: visual placement/readability band for full-world params; distinct from declared compositionOwnership.lane

owns: foreground artist mark and line behavior: loops, scratches, drips, splatters, dot/grid catches, and near readable marks
avoid: another dominant middleground news-pressure band, barricade/grid, or knot structure

compositionAdaptations: Retained as the declared foreground artist mark field, preserving near hatching, scratch slashes, contour loops, dot-grid catches, and small fracture shards.
Foreground-marks band and reduced supporting priority document that it should texture and clarify the pressure structure, not become another dominant middleground band.
Preserved as the foreground artist-style system; documented it as supporting near hatching, contour loops, scratches, dot catches, and small shards rather than another middleground band.
composition modified artist-mark-field from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Inspected the available loose concept reference image directly and used it only for broad pale-paper value balance, red/yellow/grey accent density, and directional mark mood.
Static validation passed for drafts/artist-mark-field.module.mjs with no errors after the final revision.
Attempt 2 Playwright preview rendered successfully in WebGPU mode with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Attempt 2 screenshot shows a readable foreground artist mark field: near pale paper catches, red/yellow/grey shard slashes, contour loops, hatching, drip-like scratches, and dot-grid catches distributed through the view without adding another dominant middleground band.

owns: foreground artist mark and line behavior: loops, scratches, drips, splatters, dot/grid catches, and near readable marks
avoid: another dominant middleground news-pressure band, barricade/grid, or knot structure

compositionEvidence.draftIntent: Assemble the three accepted WebGPU-compatible Zaha Hadid heatwave modules into one high-key architectural pressure field with large negative space, an off-center fracture corridor, and controlled foreground mark behavior.

image.altText: Some bird species are suffering particularly from the heatwave: "It is an additional factor contributing to their disappearance from cities" by Zaha Hadid.
